Irregular
Fruit Catch

Catch the correct forms. Level 4: steer each word into V1, V2 or V3.

Start with V2: went. Advanced levels also practise V3: gone.

Controls: ← → / A D / mouse / touch. Level 4: steer the fruit. P pauses.
